text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Osaka Hai, the spring G1 race
that always draws the strongest competitors...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! The fans are getting really excited, aren't
they?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'm super pumped too, because I'm
going to be running with Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I wanna find out just how strong someone called
"the Emperor" really is!
choice_data_list: Put the pedal to the metal!
Put the pedal to the metal!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there's no speed limit on the turf! It's top
gear or nothing!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, Spe. You're supposed to stay quiet in
the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you guys! You came all the way to Hanshin
to see the race?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, I wanted to see you run with my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Getting ready for the Yasuda Kinen, are you? In
that case, I'll have to give it all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'll be rooting for you too, so do your best!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I can't look bad in front of these beloved
little students!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll give them an amazing race that proves I'm
worthy of being chased after!
